description: Stone-skinned mountain nomads driven by fierce competition and a code valuing strength above all.
subraces: Stoic artisans carving cliff faces and valuing patience over brute force.
Ice-veined warriors thriving in killing cold and wrestling glacial beasts for sport.
Forge-born smiths with heat-resistant skin, crafting weapons in volcanic calderas.
High-altitude visionaries dwelling above the clouds and cultivating prophetic dreams.
Lightning-touched champions hearing the voice of thunder and commanding the sky's fury.
Broad, slow-witted brutes prizing eating contests and territorial squabbles over craft.
